# Auto Agent Protocol

> AAP is an open A2A v1.0 profile that lets AI buyer-agents discover a car dealership, browse its real inventory, and submit consented sales leads. Sole transport: A2A SendMessage over JSON-RPC 2.0. Discovery via /.well-known/agent-card.json. Five skills: dealer.information, inventory.facets, inventory.search, inventory.vehicle, lead.submit. Current version v1.1; extension URI https://autoagentprotocol.org/extensions/aap/v1.1.

AAP is transport-only A2A: an agent calls the A2A `SendMessage` method with a JSON-RPC 2.0 envelope, and each skill defines a strict JSON request/response schema carried inside `Message.parts[].data`. The entire specification is also available as a single self-contained file at https://autoagentprotocol.org/llms-full.txt.

## Start here
- [Introduction](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/intro): What AAP is and the A2A v1.0 profile it defines
- [Why AAP](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/why): Why automotive retail needs AAP and its design goals
- [Discovery](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/discovery): Finding a dealership via /.well-known/agent-card.json and the aap extension
- [A2A profile](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/a2a-profile): Exactly which A2A features AAP requires
- [JSON-RPC binding](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/bindings/json-rpc): The SendMessage envelope and JSON-RPC 2.0 shape
- [Errors](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/errors): Shared error model and the errors[] array

## Skills
- [dealer.information](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/skills/dealer-information): Return the dealership profile — group name, welcome message, and one or more rooftops (locations) with their address, geo, contacts, business hours, timezone, and service capabilities.
- [inventory.facets](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/skills/inventory-facets): Return searchable inventory facets such as makes, models, years, conditions, body styles, price ranges, mileage ranges, drivetrain, fuel type, and statuses.
- [inventory.search](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/skills/inventory-search): Search vehicle inventory by query, make, model, trim, year, condition, price, mileage, body style, VIN, stock, features, and availability.
- [inventory.vehicle](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/skills/inventory-vehicle): Return details for a specific vehicle by VIN, stock number, or vehicle_id, including status, pricing disclosure, photos, mileage, trim, features, fuel economy, and dealer page URL.
- [lead.submit](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/skills/lead-submit): Submit a consented lead carrying customer info plus any combination of vehicle of interest, trade-in, and appointment request — a single unified contract that matches how dealerships actually take leads (e.g. test-drive a new car while getting a trade-in appraised in the same visit).

## Machine-readable artifacts
- [OpenAPI (JSON-RPC)](https://autoagentprotocol.org/v1.1/openapi-jsonrpc.yaml): OpenAPI 3.1 description of AAP over the JSON-RPC binding
- [MCP manifest](https://autoagentprotocol.org/v1.1/mcp.json): AAP skills exposed as MCP tools
- [JSON Schemas](https://autoagentprotocol.org/v1.1/schemas/agent-card.schema.json): JSON Schema 2020-12 objects, one file per type under /v1.1/schemas/ (source of truth)
- [Agent Card example](https://autoagentprotocol.org/v1.1/examples/agent-card.example.json): Sample /.well-known/agent-card.json declaring the aap extension
- [Full spec, single file](https://autoagentprotocol.org/llms-full.txt): Entire AAP protocol inlined for one-fetch ingestion

## Optional
- [Behavior rules](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/behavior-rules): Agent conduct expectations
- [Pricing & FTC](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/pricing-and-ftc): Three-field pricing (msrp, list_price, price) and disclosure rules
- [Versioning](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/versioning): Version policy and extension URIs
- [MCP compatibility](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/compatibility/mcp): How AAP maps to MCP
- [ADF mapping](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/compatibility/adf-mapping): Lead → ADF/XML mapping
- [Contributing](https://autoagentprotocol.org/docs/v1.1/contributing): How to propose changes
- [A2A specification](https://a2a-protocol.org/latest/specification/): The base A2A v1.0 protocol AAP profiles
- [Homepage](https://autoagentprotocol.org): Project landing page
